title: Yargh'un
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yargh'uns''' were creatures native to [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. Toothy rodents, they were roughly a meter in length, and were used in garbage disposal not thrown to [[maw luur]]s. Yargh'un's were also used as a form of humiliating death. Those accused of heresy or treachery were often thrown into pits filled with yargh'uns. During his purge of the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' Heresy]], [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] kept several [[Yargh'un pit|charnel pits]] filled with yargh'uns, where he would throw heretics to be eaten alive by the yargh'uns.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
